features.name: Hit Dice
features.description: d12 per barbarian + level Constitution modifier

features.name: Reckless
features.description: You can reroll an attack roll or a saving throw and must use the new roll.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: You can spend 1 Rage Point to regain 1 hit point.

features.name: Rage
features.description: On your turn, you can enter a rage. While raging, you gain the following benefits: You have advantage on Strength checks andStrength saving throws, and your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 2d6 damage. The rage lasts for 1 minute, or until you are incapacitated or willing to end it as a bonus action.

features.name: Primal Path
features.description: At 2nd level, you choose one of the following paths and gain features from it at your barbarian level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th levels. (See below for descriptions of these paths.)
